title: EmuNO
description: Disables various macOS-specific behaviors, making your life better
body:
# EmuNO

This open source mod disables various macOS-specific behaviors, making your life better!

![Available for Fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg) ![Requires Fabric API](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg) ![No Forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg) [![GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/RyanModDev/EmuNO) [![Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/ty7GCnN87U) [![Ko-fi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/ryancaodev)

## Fixes

- [**MC-59810**](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-59810) Removes `Ctrl` + Left Click = Right Click emulation to allow for attacking while sprinting
- [**MC-22882**](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-22882) Removes requirement to press `Cmd` for `Ctrl` keybindings (fixing **`Ctrl + Q`**)
- [**MC-121772** (resolved)](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-121772) ~~Enables **Shift + Scroll** to actually work~~
